summary: Unified balance aggregation is working for this wallet on the Avalanche route.
The quote path for sending 0.1 USDC to Avalanche works and the information shown is complete enough to review the route.
The end-to-end bridge transaction completed successfully and the UI balance updated on the destination chain.
This successful route appears to rely on a gasless signed-intent flow rather than a direct wallet-broadcast transaction.
worked: Unified balance loaded in the live UI and surfaced a total of 4.9209 USDC.
Balance breakdown opened successfully and exposed per-chain USDC balances.
A real 0.1 USDC route to Avalanche was quoted successfully with spend, receive, and fee information.
The execution flow advanced into the token allowance step for the selected source chain.
The wallet signed the typed-data request used during the allowance flow.
The bridge completed successfully in the live UI and the destination balance updated to include 0.1 USDC on Avalanche.
This route completed without a direct wallet-broadcast transaction, which is consistent with a gasless permit-plus-relayer flow.

issues.title: Background 400 Error Visible In Console
issues.details: The app still emits a recurring 400 resource error during normal usage. It did not block this route, but it remains noisy and could hide other issues.
reproduction: Open FastBridge on any supported route.
Observe the recurring 400 resource error during startup.
issues.rootCause: One or more startup requests are failing with a 400 without a user-facing surface.

issues.title: Background 401 Error During Nexus Setup
issues.details: A 401 resource error appeared during initialization, even though the route still progressed. Users do not get an explicit explanation for it in the UI.
reproduction: Connect a wallet on the Avalanche route.
issues.rootCause: Telemetry/logging endpoint requires authorization and fails noisily during normal flows.

checkpoints.label: Quote rendering
checkpoints.notes: Spend 0.1103 USDC, receive 0.1 USDC, fees 0.0103 USDC.

checkpoints.label: Allowance review
checkpoints.notes: Allowance modal rendered with approval options.

checkpoints.label: Execution completion
checkpoints.notes: Bridge successful state rendered with final amounts and explorer link.

expectations.name: Unified balance and breakdown are visible
expectations.notes: Initial unified 4.9209 USDC; breakdown rows captured: 5.

expectations.name: Spend, receive, and fee details shown
expectations.notes: Spend 0.1103 USDC, receive 0.1 USDC, fees 0.0103 USDC.

expectations.name: Error messages are user-readable
expectations.notes: No user-facing action failure was observed in this run.

expectations.name: Execution completes within 30s
expectations.notes: Measured 15191 ms from approval click to final capture.

expectations.name: Balances refresh after completion
expectations.notes: Unified balance changed from 4.9209 USDC to 4.9105 USDC after completion.

expectations.name: Delivered output matches quoted output
expectations.notes: Quoted receive 0.1 USDC; actual receive 0.1 USDC.

expectations.name: Actual fees do not materially exceed quoted fees
expectations.notes: Quoted fees 0.0103 USDC; actual fees 0.010357 USDC.
